  "findings": [
    "Conductors installed in a wet location do not have the required wet-rated insulation type (e.g., missing the 'W' designation such as THWN, XHHW)."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work on this circuit, pull out the non-compliant conductors, and replace them with conductors rated for wet locations."
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing conductors without a wet-location rating (such as THHN in a wet location) violates NEC requirements, as the insulation will degrade when exposed to moisture, leading to ground faults, short circuits, and potential shock or fire hazards.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 310.10(C)",
    "NEC Table 310.16"
  ]
}
